mapper.insert:
insert into his_inpatient_charge_mirror ( id, tenant_id, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, exec_dept_id, exec_dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.execDeptId}, #{e.execDeptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDate}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.update: update his_inpatient_charge_mirror set exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId}, exec_dept_name = #{execDeptName}, row_fingerprint = #{rowFingerprint}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and his_inpatient_charge_id = #{hisChargeId} and (exec_dept_id is null or trim(exec_dept_id) = '') and #{execDeptId} is not null and trim(#{execDeptId}) != ''
